headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Illinois Tool Works, Raises Price Target to $301
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) with a Hold and raises the price target from $280 to $301.
